prompt_text:
### Demographics: 57-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 3 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after elevated fasting glucose on routine screening
Current symptoms: Rare nocturnal hypoglycemia (1 episode in 3 months); no DKA/HHS signs; Recurrent UTIs over the last 6 months with dysuria/frequency.

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 3a (45-59)
Heart failure: HFrEF (NYHA Class II)
ASCVD: Coronary artery disease (History of PCI/stent)
Body mass index category: Obese Class II
Recurrent Complicated Urinary Tract Infections
Osteoporosis (on bisphosphonate therapy)
Rheumatoid Arthritis
Female Breast Cancer (Endocrine Therapy)
Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Disease
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 3a (45-59); HF: HFrEF (NYHA Class II); ASCVD: Coronary artery disease (History of PCI/stent); MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Obese Class II
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (older sister)
- Social history: Current smoker (5 cigarettes/day for 15 years; ~3.8 pack-years); Alcohol 3-4 drinks/week (2-3 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 1000mg twice daily; Semaglutide 1mg once weekly; Dapagliflozin 10mg once daily; Methotrexate (15 mg weekly), Prednisone (5 mg daily), Fluticasone/salmeterol Inhaler (twice daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily), Nitrofurantoin (100 mg twice daily for prophylaxis), Alendronate (70 mg weekly), Calcium Carbonate 500 Mg + Cholecalciferol 1000 Iu (daily), Tamoxifen (20 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 82.5 kg; Height 160.1 cm; BMI 32.2 kg/m²; Blood pressure 128/85 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 9.1%; 9 months ago 9.5%; 6 months ago 9.3%; 3 months ago 9.4%; current 9.8%), FPG (12 months ago 193mg/dL; 9 months ago 216mg/dL; 6 months ago 225mg/dL; 3 months ago 223mg/dL; current 229mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 80.8kg; 9 months ago 82.9kg; 6 months ago 82.2kg; 3 months ago 83.3kg; current 82.5kg), Height (12 months ago 160.1cm; 9 months ago 160.1cm; 6 months ago 160.1cm; 3 months ago 160.1cm; current 160.1cm), BMI (12 months ago 32.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 32.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 32.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 32.0kg/m²; current 32.2kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 126mmHg; 9 months ago 127mmHg; 6 months ago 122mmHg; 3 months ago 122mmHg; current 128mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 86mmHg; 9 months ago 86mmHg; 6 months ago 87mmHg; 3 months ago 86mmHg; current 85mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 9U/L; 9 months ago 10U/L; 6 months ago 8.0U/L; 3 months ago 10U/L; current 13U/L), AST (12 months ago 19U/L; 9 months ago 26U/L; 6 months ago 28U/L; 3 months ago 18U/L; current 24U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.7mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.7mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.7mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.7mg/dL; current 0.7mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 51mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 50mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 50mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 46mL/min/1.73m²; current 47mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 65mg/g; 9 months ago 67mg/g; 6 months ago 72mg/g; 3 months ago 108mg/g; current 95mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 75mg/dL; 9 months ago 74mg/dL; 6 months ago 81mg/dL; 3 months ago 81mg/dL; current 77mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 45mg/dL; 9 months ago 42mg/dL; 6 months ago 42mg/dL; 3 months ago 43mg/dL; current 44mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 139mg/dL; 9 months ago 156mg/dL; 6 months ago 142mg/dL; 3 months ago 155mg/dL; current 150mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 12.0g/dL; 9 months ago 12.0g/dL; 6 months ago 12.8g/dL; 3 months ago 12.1g/dL; current 12.2g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Very poor adherence (estimated <50%); SMBG rarely performed; lifestyle control severely limited.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
